• Solid diffusion is common in the synthesis of many engineering
• Semiconductor: Dopants are introduced into solid silicon to
• Steel: Hardening of steel due to diffusion of carbon and other
• Two common diffusion mechanism: vacancy diffusion,
• Atom “jumps” from a lattice position of solid into neighboring
• Atom continues to diffuse through solid by a series of jumps
• Atom must “push” other atoms to move from one site to
• Atom jumps from one interstitial site to a neighboring one
• Involve dilation and distortion of lattice
• Faster than vacancy diffusion because the diffusing atoms is
usually smaller and there are more interstitial site than vacancy
• The diffusivity increases with increasing temperature according

• Gas molecules collide with the wall more frequently than with each

One step in the manufacture of optical fibers is the chemical vapor deposition of silane
inside surface of a hollow glass fiber to form a very thin cladding of solid silicon by reaction:
Typically, the process is carried out at high temperature and very low total system pressure. Optical
fibers for high bandwidth data transmission have very small inner pore diameters, typically less than 20
µm. If the inner diameter of the Si-coated hollow glass fiber is 10 µm, assess the importance of
inside the fiber lumen at 900 K and 100 Pa total system pressure. Calculate
the effective diffusivity of silane in this system. Silane is diluted to 1 mol% in the inert carrier gas helium.
The binary gas diffusivity of silane in helium at 25 oC and 1 atm total system pressure is 0.571 cm2/s,
